title: anthemis callichroa
intro: Anthemis callichroa, also known as Calendula, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound care and skin issues. The health benefits of Anthemis callichroa include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
